field.name: id
field.summary: Identifier of the target blob container and blob.

field.name: version
field.summary: Optional blob version used when addressing versioned blobs.

field.name: connection
field.summary: Connection string used to connect to Azure Blob Storage.

field.name: blobclient
field.summary: Blob client used to perform operations against a specific blob.

field.name: containerclient
field.summary: Blob container client used to perform operations against the container.
